title: Taxi Murter to Dubrovnik Airport | Fixed €535 Transfer | TAXI Antonio
description: Private taxi and transfer from Murter to Dubrovnik Airport. Fixed €535 per car, up to 4 passengers, door to door. Book direct with Antonio.

schema.name: Taxi Murter to Dubrovnik Airport
schema.description: Private, fixed-price taxi and transfer from Murter to Dubrovnik Airport, 535 euros per car for up to 4 passengers, door to door.

offers.description: One-way private transfer from Murter to Dubrovnik Airport, per car for up to 4 passengers. Return 1070 euros.

mainEntity.name: How far is Dubrovnik Airport from Murter, and how long is the drive?

acceptedAnswer.text: The drive from Murter to Dubrovnik Airport is around 338 km and takes roughly 4 h 50 min in normal traffic, a little longer at busy times in summer. I plan the pickup so a slow patch never leaves you rushed.

mainEntity.name: How much is a taxi from Murter to Dubrovnik Airport?

acceptedAnswer.text: A fixed 535 per car, one way, for up to 4 passengers. The price is per vehicle, not per person, and includes tolls, fuel and luggage. A return trip is 1070.

mainEntity.name: What time should I leave Murter for my flight?

acceptedAnswer.text: As a rule, about 3 hours before an international flight and 2 hours before a domestic one. Tell me your flight time and I will confirm the exact pickup.

mainEntity.name: Do you drop us right at the departures terminal?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. I take you straight to the departures drop-off at Dubrovnik Airport and help with your luggage. No parking walk, no shuttle.

mainEntity.name: How far in advance should I book?

acceptedAnswer.text: At least 2 hours ahead so I can confirm the car and your pickup, and earlier for early-morning flights and high season. For a sooner ride, call or WhatsApp me directly.
